strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators aligns with required AI agent development skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and architecture across web, mobile, and embedded
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin and minimal Python exposure among listed skills
No explicit mention of cloud-native Kubernetes or major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz
response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering across the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which directly matches the role's focus on internal automation tooling and agentic workflows. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, light Kotlin/Python, and limited cloud/Kubernetes detail, though the breadth of languages, craftsmanship practices, and architecture experience suggest these would be quick to bridge.
